title: serpocaulon loriceum
intro: Serpocaulon loriceum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the Loricate Lady Fern or Loricate Shield Fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits associated with Serpocaulon loriceum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
